description_long: This is a rustic wooden fence composed of two connected panels, each made from vertical wooden planks of varying widths and heights. The planks are supported by three horizontal rails, with the top and bottom rails running parallel and a middle rail providing extra stability. The wood appears weathered, with visible grain and natural imperfections, giving it a rugged, utilitarian look suitable for urban parks, gardens, or residential boundaries. The fence posts extend slightly above the top rail, but there are no decorative caps or finials. The overall structure is open, with gaps between the planks, allowing partial visibility through the fence. The finish is matte and rough, emphasizing its practical, handmade construction.
description: A rustic, weathered wooden fence with two connected panels of vertical planks and three horizontal rails, featuring a rough, utilitarian finish and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the fence, with vertical planks and rails barely visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full face of the fence, with two panels of vertical wooden planks and three horizontal rails.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the narrow edge of the fence.
description_view_3: Rear view of the fence, nearly identical to the front, with visible vertical planks and horizontal rails.
